en: Cause ain't no way I'ma let you stop me from causing mayhem When I say I'ma do something, I do it
ko: 난 네가 나를 막게 할 수는 없어.
ja: お前に俺の大暴れを止めさせるわけないだろ
zhTW: 因為我絕不會讓你阻止我製造混亂
vi: Vi khong co cach nao toi de ban ngan toi gay hon loan

en: I don't give a damn what you think I'm doing this for me So fuck the world, feed it beans
ko: 네가 뭐라고 생각하든 상관 없어, 난 나를 위해 하는 거야.
ja: お前がどう思うか知るかよ、これは自分のためだ
zhTW: 我才不管你怎麼想，這是為我自己做的
vi: Toi khong quan tam ban nghi gi, toi lam dieu nay cho toi

en: It's gassed up, everything's stopping me I'ma be what I set out to be Without a doubt, I'm tired of pleading
ko: 모든 게 나를 막을 수 없어.
ja: なりたい自分になる 間違いなく 疑いなく 俺を見下す奴ら全員
zhTW: 我要成為我立志要成為的人 毫無疑問 所有看不起我的人
vi: Toi se tro thanh nhung gi toi dat ra Khong nghi ngo gi Tat ca nhung ai coi thuong toi

en: All those who look down on me, I'm tearing down your balcony Knowing fans of us, don't try to ask him why or how can he
ko: 난 너의 발코니를 부수고 있어. 팬들이 열광하는 걸 알면서.
ja: お前のバルコニーを壊してやる ファンたちも分かってる
zhTW: 我要拆掉你的陽台 知道粉絲都快瘋了
vi: Toi se pha ban cong cua ban Biet rang fan dang phat cuong

en: From Infinite down to the last relapse album He's still shitting, whether he's on salary
ko: 무한한 고통 속에서도 마지막 재발까지 난 계속 할 거야.

zhTW: 從Infinite到最後一次Relapse 我還是會繼續
vi: Tu Infinite den lan tai phat cuoi cung Toi van se tiep tuc

en: Paid hourly until he bows out Or he shits his bowels out of him

zhTW: 直到他退出或他的身體垮掉
vi: Cho den khi anh ay bo cuoc hay kiet suc

zhTW: 聖誕節就是詛咒 忘了地球吧 他得到了全世界
vi: Nhu toi cho ban mon qua Giang sinh, mon qua nay la loi nguyen Quen trai dat di

ja: 立ち上がるために、立ち上がるために

en: Come take my hand We'll walk this road together Through the storm
ko: 우리는 이 길을 함께 걸을 거야. 폭풍 속에서도.
ja: 一緒にこの道を歩こう 嵐の中を
zhTW: 我們一起走這條路 穿越風暴

en: Whatever weather, cold or warm Just letting you know that you're not alone
ja: 一人じゃないって伝えたいだけ
zhTW: 只是讓你知道你不孤單
vi: Chi muon ban biet rang ban khong co don

en: Holla if you feel like you've been down the same road Okay, quit playing with your sister's shit and cut the crap
ko: 같은 길을 걸어본 적이 있다면 외쳐봐.
ja: 同じ道を歩んできたと感じるなら叫べ
zhTW: 如果你覺得你走過同樣的路就喊一聲
vi: Hay ho len neu ban cam thay minh da di tren cung con duong
